name: Shopify
description: Manage a Shopify store via the GraphQL Admin API (2026-01): products, orders, customers, inventory, fulfillment. Uses a Custom App access token (shpat_...). Read and write access — tested live against a real Shopify store.

credentials_required.label: Shopify Store Domain
credentials_required.hint: Your myshopify.com domain without https:// (e.g. myshop.myshopify.com). Find it in Shopify Admin > Settings > Domains.

credentials_required.label: Shopify Admin API Access Token
credentials_required.hint: Create in Shopify Admin > Settings > Apps and sales channels > Develop apps > Create an app > Configure Admin API scopes > Install. Token starts with 'shpat_'. Required scopes: read/write products, orders, customers, inventory, locations, order_edits, fulfillments, merchant_managed_fulfillment_orders, draft_orders.

tools.name: list_products
tools.description: List products with optional search query, pagination cursor, and limit

tools.name: get_product
tools.description: Get full details of a single product including variants, inventory, and pricing

tools.name: create_product
tools.description: Create a new product with title, description, vendor, product type, tags, status, and initial price

tools.name: update_product
tools.description: Update an existing product's title, description, vendor, tags, status, or default variant price

tools.name: delete_product
tools.description: Permanently delete a product by ID

tools.name: list_orders
tools.description: List orders with optional search query (Shopify query syntax), pagination, and limit

tools.name: get_order
tools.description: Get full details of a single order including line items, customer, fulfillment status, and totals

tools.name: update_order
tools.description: Update an order's tags or note (add metadata, not line items — use edit_order_quantity for that)

tools.name: edit_order_quantity
tools.description: Change the quantity of a line item on an existing order (begin → setQuantity → commit)

tools.name: create_fulfillment
tools.description: Mark order line items as fulfilled with optional tracking number and carrier

tools.name: list_customers
tools.description: List customers with optional search query and limit

tools.name: create_customer
tools.description: Create a new customer with email, first/last name, phone, and tags

tools.name: update_customer
tools.description: Update an existing customer's email, name, phone, or tags

tools.name: adjust_inventory
tools.description: Increase or decrease inventory quantity for a variant at a location (delta, not absolute)

author: freddy-schuetz
